---
title: Tradable services employment recovery varies across regions
description: Chart showing tradable services employment and wage trends by Census
  region.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-tradable-services-regional-job-wage/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Labor Market
  - Economic Indicators
  - Geography
tags:
  - QCEW
  - Employment
  - Wages
  - Tradable Services
  - Regional
  - Line Chart
image: tradable_services_regional_job_wage.svg
chart:
  title: Tradable services employment recovery varies across regions
  chartType: line
  interactive: false
  dataSource: Bureau of Labor Statistics, Quarterly Census of Employment and Wages
  sourceUrl: https://www.bls.gov/cew/
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - qcew-employment-wages
usesPackages:
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart examines tradable services sector performance across Census regions, highlighting geographic variation in this key growth sector.](./tradable_services_regional_job_wage.svg)

## Overview

This chart examines tradable services sector performance across Census regions, highlighting geographic variation in this key growth sector.

## Key Findings

- Tradable services employment recovery varies significantly by region
- Western and Southern regions show stronger tradable services growth

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/tradable_services_regional_job_wage.R` in the producing project.
